creator: tony.maher@en-bio.com.au
text:
Update: this port works under 4.0 current (Jan 24) and 3.0
stable/release.

Minor corrections in Makefile:

MAN1=   nmapmgr.1m nqs.1 nqsconfig.1 nqsgs.1 nqsrn.1\
    qacct.1 qalter.1 qcat.1 qcmplx.1 qdel.1 qdev.1\
    qhold.1 qjob.1 qlimit.1 qmgr.1m qmsg.1 qpr.1\
    qresume.1 qrls.1 qstat.1 qstatc.1 qsub.1 qsuspend.1
                                             ^^^^^^^^^^ add this

Change the following comments

# We rename TEMPLATE (which is known to work for 2.2.6) to the release
number
#   of this machine. It should should work for minor releases.
#   I dont know about 3.0 stuff.

to

# We rename TEMPLATE (which is known to work for 2.2.6 up to and
including
#   4.0 current Jan 26) to the release number of this machine.

tonym
